basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design & Manufacturing Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech with GATE/NET score in Electrical/Electronics/Computer Science Engineering or similar discipline. Master's degree with 7 CPI/CGPA or 65% at graduation level is desired. Knowledge of machine learning, optimization, MATLAB is preferred.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E. / B. Tech. with qualified GATE/NET score, in Electrical/Electronics/Computer Science Engineering/ any similar discipline with knowledge in the field of the project. Non-GATE qualified candidate may be considered if they qualify written test OR they may be considered at reduced remuneration rate (Rs. 30000/- pm plus accommodation or HRA), as per ANRF/OM/N-01/2024.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month plus accommodation or HRA.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITDM Jabalpur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIITDM Jabalpur is June 30, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech with a GATE/NET score in Electrical/Electronics/Computer Science Engineering or a similar discipline. A Master's degree with a good CPI/CGPA is also desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with accommodation or House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced by IIITDM Jabalpur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIITDM Jabalpur JRF recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written test, if applicable, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIITDM Jabalpur located?
faq.answer: IIITDM Jabalpur is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482005.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, indicating it is for a specific research project.

faq.question: Q10. Can non-GATE qualified candidates apply?
faq.answer: Yes, non-GATE qualified candidates may be considered if they pass a written test or may be offered a reduced remuneration.
